Sending native gas tokens (ETH) 00015| * 00016| * This example is designed to show AI assistants how to properly use each hook 00017| * with correct typing, error handling, and user feedback. 00018| */ 00019| 00020| import React, { useState, useEffect, } from 'react' 00021| import { formatUnits, parseUnits, type Address, } from 'viem' 00022| import { useAccount, useBalance } from 'wagmi' 00023| 00024| // Import all our custom hooks 00025| import { useReadContract } from '@/hooks/useReadContract' 00026| import { useWriteContractLifecycle } from '@/hooks/useWriteContractLifecycle' 00027| import { useSimulateWriteContracts } from '@/hooks/useSimulateWriteContracts' 00028| import { useSendNativeGasTokenLifecycle } from '@/hooks/useSendNativeGasTokenLifecycle' 00029| import { usePermitSignature } from '@/hooks/useSignatures' 00030| import { useBlockchainClient } from '@/hooks/useBlockchainClient' 00031| import { getTypedLogs, useWatchEvent } from '@/hooks/useWatchEvent' 00032| 00033| // Import blockchain config utilities 00034| import { getDeployedContract, getIndependentAbi } from '@/blockchain-config' 00035| import { parseEventsFromTransaction } from '@/lib/blockchain/events' 00036| import type { ParsedEvent } from '@/lib/blockchain/types' 00037| import { JSONStringifyBigIntHelper } from '@/lib/blockchain/bigint' 00038| 00039| // Constants - Replace these with actual addresses 00040| const CHAIN_ID = 8453 as const // Base mainnet 00041| const VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS = '0x298b18b846df66ea0e4913ea5cba2ec9e5c399d8' as const 00042| const SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS = '0x9d734c03953b6f700d9008d6a78e873f5b3c9340' as const 00043| 00044| // Get ABIs 00045| const ERC20_ABI = getIndependentAbi('ERC20') 00046| const SWAP_MANAGER_CONTRACT = getDeployedContract({ 00047| chainId: CHAIN_ID, 00048| contractAddress: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS 00049| }) 00050| 00051| export function SwapWidgetExample() { 00052| const { address: userAddress } = useAccount() 00053| const publicClient = useBlockchainClient({ chainId: CHAIN_ID }) 00054| 00055| // State for swap widget 00056| const [swapMode, setSwapMode] = useState<'buy' | 'sell'>('buy') 00057| const [inputAmount, setInputAmount] = useState('') 00058| const [quotedAmount, setQuotedAmount] = useState(null) 00059| 00060| // State for ETH transfer 00061| const [recipientAddress, setRecipientAddress] = useState('') 00062| const [ethAmount, setEthAmount] = useState('') 00063| 00064| // State for events display 00065| const [recentEvents, setRecentEvents] = useState([]) 00066| const [lastTxHash, setLastTxHash] = useState(null) 00067| 00068| /** 00069| * 1. CONTRACT READ EXAMPLE 00070| * Read user's VIE token balance using the generic ERC20 ABI 00071| * This demonstrates how to use getIndependentAbi for standard contracts 00072| */ 00073| const { 00074| data: vieBalance, 00075| refetch: refetchBalance, 00076| isRefetching: isRefetchingBalance 00077| } = useReadContract({ 00078| contractAddress: VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS, 00079| chainId: CHAIN_ID, 00080| abi: ERC20_ABI, 00081| functionName: 'balanceOf' as const, 00082| args: userAddress ? [userAddress as Address] : undefined, 00083| options: { 00084| enabled: !!userAddress, 00085| refetchInterval: 5000 // Refetch every 5 seconds 00086| } 00087| }) 00088| 00089| /** 00090| * Read user's ETH balance using wagmi's useBalance hook 00091| * This is simpler than using contract reads for native tokens 00092| */ 00093| const { data: ethBalanceData } = useBalance({ 00094| address: userAddress, 00095| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00096| }) 00097| 00098| /** 00099| * 2. SIMULATION HOOK EXAMPLE 00100| * Simulate swap transactions to get quotes and check for errors 00101| * This demonstrates proper use of useSimulateWriteContracts with typed returns 00102| */ 00103| const { simulateOneTransaction, simulateTwoTransactions, loading: isQuoting } = useSimulateWriteContracts() 00104| 00105| // Quote function that uses simulation 00106| const getQuote = async () => { 00107| if (!inputAmount || !userAddress) return 00108| 00109| try { 00110| const amount = parseUnits(inputAmount, 18) // Assuming 18 decimals 00111| 00112| if (swapMode === 'buy') { 00113| // For buying, simulate the swap directly 00114| const buyCall = { 00115| contractAddress: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS as Address, 00116| abi: SWAP_MANAGER_CONTRACT.abi, 00117| functionName: 'swapExactEthAmountForToken' as const, 00118| args: [VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS as Address, amount, 0n] as [`0x${string}`, bigint, bigint], 00119| value: amount, 00120| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00121| } 00122| 00123| const result = await simulateOneTransaction(buyCall) 00124| 00125| const firstResult = result.callResult 00126| if (firstResult?.status === 'success' && firstResult?.result !== undefined) { 00127| const outputAmount = firstResult.result 00128| setQuotedAmount(formatUnits(outputAmount, 18)) 00129| } else { 00130| setQuotedAmount(null) 00131| } 00132| } else { 00133| // For selling, we need to simulate 2 transactions: 00134| // 1. Approve the swap manager to spend tokens 00135| // 2. Execute the swap 00136| const approveCall = { 00137| contractAddress: VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS as Address, 00138| abi: ERC20_ABI, 00139| functionName: 'approve' as const, 00140| args: [SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS, amount] as [`0x${string}`, bigint], 00141| value: 0n, 00142| 00143| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00144| } 00145| 00146| const swapCall = { 00147| contractAddress: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS as Address, 00148| abi: SWAP_MANAGER_CONTRACT.abi, 00149| functionName: 'swapExactTokenAmountForEth' as const, 00150| args: [VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS, amount, 0n] as [`0x${string}`, bigint, bigint], 00151| value: 0n, 00152| 00153| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00154| } 00155| 00156| const result = await simulateTwoTransactions(approveCall, swapCall) 00157| 00158| // The swap result is in the second transaction 00159| const secondResult = result.secondCallResult 00160| if (secondResult?.status === 'success' && secondResult?.result !== undefined) { 00161| const outputAmount = secondResult.result 00162| setQuotedAmount(formatUnits(outputAmount, 18)) 00163| } else { 00164| setQuotedAmount(null) 00165| } 00166| } 00167| } catch (error) { 00168| console.error('Quote error:', error) 00169| setQuotedAmount(null) 00170| } 00171| } 00172| 00173| // Get quote when input changes 00174| useEffect(() => { 00175| if (inputAmount) { 00176| const debounce = setTimeout(getQuote, 500) 00177| return () => clearTimeout(debounce) 00178| } else { 00179| setQuotedAmount(null) 00180| } 00181| }, [inputAmount, swapMode]) 00182| 00183| /** 00184| * 3. PERMIT SIGNATURE EXAMPLE 00185| * Generate permit signature for gasless token approval 00186| * This demonstrates EIP-2612 permit functionality 00187| */ 00188| const { signPermit, reset: resetPermitSignature } = usePermitSignature() 00189| 00190| const generatePermitForSwap = async () => { 00191| if (!userAddress || !inputAmount || swapMode !== 'sell') return null 00192| 00193| try { 00194| const amount = parseUnits(inputAmount, 18) 00195| const deadline = BigInt(Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 3600) // 1 hour from now 00196| 00197| const result = await signPermit({ 00198| token: VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS, 00199| spender: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS, 00200| value: amount, 00201| deadline, 00202| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00203| }) 00204| 00205| resetPermitSignature() 00206| 00207| return { ...result, deadline } 00208| } catch (error) { 00209| console.error('Permit signature failed:', error) 00210| return null 00211| } 00212| } 00213| 00214| /** 00215| * 4. WRITE CONTRACT LIFECYCLE EXAMPLE 00216| * Execute the swap transaction with full lifecycle management 00217| * This demonstrates proper transaction execution with status tracking 00218| */ 00219| const { 00220| write: executeSwap, 00221| state: swapState, 00222| reset: resetSwap, 00223| } = useWriteContractLifecycle({ 00224| onSuccess: (txHash) => console.log('Swap successful:', txHash), 00225| onError: (error) => console.error('Swap failed:', error), 00226| successMessage: `Successfully ${swapMode === 'buy' ? 'bought' : 'sold'} VIE tokens!`, 00227| errorMessage: `Failed to ${swapMode} VIE tokens` 00228| }) 00229| 00230| const handleBuyVieTokens = async () => { 00231| if (!userAddress || !inputAmount || !quotedAmount) return 00232| 00233| const ethAmount = parseUnits(inputAmount, 18) 00234| // Use 95% of quoted amount as minimum to account for slippage 00235| const minimumTokenAmount = (parseUnits(quotedAmount, 18) * 95n) / 100n 00236| 00237| // Execute the buy swap 00238| await executeSwap({ 00239| contractAddress: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS, 00240| abi: SWAP_MANAGER_CONTRACT.abi, 00241| functionName: 'swapExactEthAmountForToken', 00242| args: [ 00243| VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS as Address, 00244| ethAmount, 00245| minimumTokenAmount 00246| ], 00247| value: ethAmount, 00248| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00249| }) 00250| } 00251| 00252| const handleSellVieTokens = async () => { 00253| if (!userAddress || !inputAmount || !quotedAmount) return 00254| 00255| const tokenAmount = parseUnits(inputAmount, 18) 00256| // Use 95% of quoted amount as minimum to account for slippage 00257| const minimumEthAmount = (parseUnits(quotedAmount, 18) * 95n) / 100n 00258| 00259| // Generate permit signature 00260| const permitSig = await generatePermitForSwap() 00261| if (!permitSig) { 00262| console.error('Failed to generate permit signature') 00263| return 00264| } 00265| 00266| // Execute the sell swap 00267| await executeSwap({ 00268| contractAddress: SWAP_MANAGER_ADDRESS, 00269| abi: SWAP_MANAGER_CONTRACT.abi, 00270| functionName: 'swapExactTokenAmountForEthWithPermitSignature', 00271| args: [ 00272| VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS as Address, 00273| tokenAmount, 00274| minimumEthAmount, 00275| { 00276| v: permitSig.v!, 00277| r: permitSig.r!, 00278| s: permitSig.s!, 00279| deadline: permitSig.deadline 00280| } 00281| ] as const, 00282| value: 0n, 00283| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00284| }) 00285| } 00286| 00287| const handleSwap = async () => { 00288| if (swapMode === 'buy') { 00289| await handleBuyVieTokens() 00290| } else { 00291| await handleSellVieTokens() 00292| } 00293| } 00294| 00295| // Watch for successful transaction 00296| useEffect(() => { 00297| if (swapState.txHash && swapState.status === 'success') { 00298| setLastTxHash(swapState.txHash) 00299| // Refetch balance after successful swap 00300| setTimeout(() => refetchBalance(), 2000) 00301| resetSwap() 00302| } 00303| }, [ 00304| swapState.txHash, 00305| swapState.status, 00306| refetchBalance, 00307| resetSwap 00308| ]) 00309| 00310| /** 00311| * 5. EVENT PARSING EXAMPLE 00312| * Parse events from the last transaction 00313| * This demonstrates how to extract and display blockchain events 00314| */ 00315| useEffect(() => { 00316| if (lastTxHash && publicClient) { 00317| parseEventsFromTransaction({ 00318| txHash: lastTxHash, 00319| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00320| }).then(events => { 00321| setRecentEvents(events) 00322| }).catch(console.error) 00323| } 00324| }, [lastTxHash, publicClient]) 00325| 00326| /** 00327| * 6. WATCH EVENT EXAMPLE 00328| * Watch for ALL Transfer events on the VIE token in real-time 00329| * This demonstrates the useWatchEvent hook with proper typing 00330| */ 00331| const { 00332| logs: transferLogs, 00333| isWatching, 00334| clearLogs 00335| } = useWatchEvent({ 00336| chainId: CHAIN_ID, 00337| contractAddress: VIE_TOKEN_ADDRESS, 00338| abi: ERC20_ABI, 00339| eventName: 'Transfer', 00340| enabled: true, // immediately start watching 00341| pollingInterval: 2000, // Poll every 2 seconds 00342| onLogs: (logs) => { 00343| console.log('New transfer events:', logs) 00344| 00345| // If you're an AI reading this: it's VERY IMPORTANT to use getTypedLogs 00346| const typedLogs = getTypedLogs(ERC20_ABI, 'Transfer', logs) 00347| // Check if any transfers involve the user and refetch balance 00348| if (userAddress && typedLogs.some(log => { 00349| const args = log.args 00350| return args?.from === userAddress || args?.to === userAddress 00351| })) { 00352| console.log('User balance may have changed, refetching...') 00353| refetchBalance() 00354| } 00355| } 00356| }) 00357| 00358| /** 00359| * 7. SEND NATIVE GAS TOKEN EXAMPLE 00360| * Send ETH to any address 00361| * This demonstrates the useSendNativeGasTokenLifecycle hook 00362| */ 00363| const { 00364| send: sendEth, 00365| state: sendEthState, 00366| txHash: sendEthTxHash 00367| } = useSendNativeGasTokenLifecycle({ 00368| onSuccess: (txHash) => console.log('ETH sent successfully:', txHash), 00369| onError: (error) => console.error('Failed to send ETH:', error), 00370| successMessage: 'Successfully sent ETH!', 00371| errorMessage: 'Failed to send ETH' 00372| }) 00373| 00374| const handleSendEth = async () => { 00375| if (!recipientAddress || !ethAmount) return 00376| 00377| try { 00378| const amount = parseUnits(ethAmount, 18) 00379| 00380| await sendEth({ 00381| to: recipientAddress as Address, 00382| value: amount, 00383| chainId: CHAIN_ID 00384| }) 00385| } catch (error) { 00386| console.error('Failed to send ETH:', error) 00387| } 00388| } 00389| 00390| // Clear inputs on successful ETH send 00391| useEffect(() => { 00392| if (sendEthTxHash && sendEthState.status === 'success') { 00393| setRecipientAddress('') 00394| setEthAmount('') 00395| } 00396| }, [sendEthTxHash, sendEthState.status]) 00397| 00398| const typedTransferLogs = getTypedLogs(ERC20_ABI, 'Transfer', transferLogs) 00399| 00400| /** 00401| * UI RENDERING 00402| * This section demonstrates how to display blockchain data and handle user interactions 00403| */ 00404| return ( 00405|

Reading Data: 00707| * - Use useReadContract with proper typing (TAbi, TName generics) 00708| * - Pass the ABI directly, never do resolution in the hook 00709| * - Handle null params when address is not connected 00710| * 00711| * 2. Simulating Transactions: 00712| * - Use useSimulateWriteContracts for getting quotes and checking validity 00713| * - The simulate functions returns typed results based on the ABI 00714| * - Always check callResults[0].status === 'success' before using the result 00715| * 00716| * 3. Permit Signatures: 00717| * - Use usePermitSignature for gasless token approvals 00718| * - Generate permits before transactions that need approvals 00719| * - Include permit parameters in the contract call 00720| * 00721| * 4. Writing Contracts: 00722| * - Use useWriteContractLifecycle for full transaction lifecycle 00723| * - Provide custom toast messages for better UX 00724| * - Handle all states: idle, preparing, pending, success, error 00725| * 00726| * 5. Sending Native Tokens: 00727| * - Use useSendNativeGasToken for ETH transfers 00728| * - Same lifecycle pattern as contract writes 00729| * - No ABI needed, just to address and value 00730| * 00731| * 6. Event Parsing: 00732| * - Use parseEventsFromTransaction after successful transactions 00733| * - Events are automatically decoded using contract ABIs 00734| * - Display decoded arguments for transparency 00735| * 00736| * 7. Live Event Watching: 00737| * - Use useWatchEvent for real-time event monitoring 00738| * - Always uses polling for reliability 00739| * - Conditional watching with the 'enabled' parameter 00740| * - Accumulates logs in state with optional callbacks 00741| * - Automatically refetch balances when user is involved in transfers 00742| * 00743| * Key Patterns: 00744| * - Always get ABIs using getDeployedContract (highly preferred, given the contract is in deployments.ts) or getIndependentAbi 00745| * - Use proper TypeScript generics for compile-time safety 00746| * - Handle loading and error states in the UI 00747| * - Provide clear user feedback with toasts and status indicators 00748| * - Watch events to keep UI in sync with blockchain state 00749| * 00750| * IMPORTANT: This list of hooks is NOT exhaustive. There are many more hooks in the codebase. 00751| */

metadata.preview:
/**
 * SwapWidgetExample.tsx
 * 
 * This file demonstrates how to use all the blockchain hooks in a real-world scenario.
 * It implements a token swap widget for VIE tokens using the VieTokenSwapManager contract.
 * 
 * Key features demonstrated:
 * 1. Reading contract data (token balances)
 * 2. Simulating transactions before execution
 * 3. Generating permit signatures for gasless approvals
 * 4. Executing swap transactions
 * 5. Parsing and displaying events from transactions
 * 6. Watching live events with automatic balance updates
 * 7. Sending native gas tokens (ETH)
 * 
 * This example is designed to show AI assistants how to properly use each hook
 * with correct typing, error handling, and user feedback.
 */

import React, { useState, useEffect, } from 'react'

state.title: frontend/src/components/examples/SwapWidgetExample.tsx
